tools.name: twitter_like_post
tools.description: Like a tweet on Twitter/X by URL or tweet ID.

url_or_id.description: Tweet URL (twitter.com or x.com) or numeric tweet ID

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: twitter_unlike_post
tools.description: Unlike a previously liked tweet on Twitter/X by URL or tweet ID.

url_or_id.description: Tweet URL (twitter.com or x.com) or numeric tweet ID

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: twitter_auto_like_scan
tools.description: Scan a message for tweet URLs, like each one via the Twitter API, and add a Slack reaction emoji to the source message as visual confirmation.

message_text.description: The raw message text to scan for tweet URLs

reaction_emoji.description: Slack emoji name to react with (default: heart)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called
